verdict: DPO on own failures does NOT close the coverage->deployable gap: it is catastrophically fragile (a within-noise bump at 0.25ep, collapse by 0.5ep, crater by 3ep) and never beats SFT_2x. The gap is closed instead by MORE SFT-on-positives (SFT_2x triples greedy@1). Strong latent sample-discrimination (2AFC 0.81) does NOT convert to deployable gains via preference training.
